Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties, LLC. is present. Represented by Julie Anderson.
Attorney Daniel Stern, Esq., appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant James Flowers is present.
Attorney Selby Lighthill representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 525, for settlement discussions.

This case tentatively settled. Per the request of plaintiff's attorney, the trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
